RimHeroes.CheckDef.label: pick the reliquary lock
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critSuccessText: Every ward unwinds at once, as if the lock wanted to be opened by a hand this sure. The coffer falls wide.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.successText: The sigil-bolts draw back one by one, and the lid eases up under your fingers.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.failureText: A ward bites back and the mechanism resets harder than before. It can be tried again, but it will not be kind.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critFailureText: You feel a tumbler shear somewhere deep inside. The lock grinds, then sets itself stubbornly against you.

RimHeroes.CheckDef.label: spot the trap
RimHeroes.CheckDef.successText: Something about this stretch of floor is wrong. You catch it just in time.

RimHeroes.CheckDef.label: dodge the trap
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critSuccessText: You feel the plate give and you are already moving. The mechanism bites nothing but the air where you stood.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.successText: You throw yourself sideways as it goes off. It misses.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.failureText: You react a heartbeat too slow. The trap catches you.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critFailureText: You step square onto it with no warning at all. It takes you full force.

RimHeroes.CheckDef.label: disarm the trap
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critSuccessText: You read the whole mechanism at a glance and still its heart with one certain touch.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.successText: You trace the linkage, ease the tension off the trigger, and the trap goes quiet.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.failureText: Your hand slips on the trigger and the trap springs.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critFailureText: You catch exactly the wrong piece. It goes off in your hands.
